# Catalyst.AI workspace instructions
- This repo is a Python Streamlit + FastAPI prototype for clinical trial operations oversight.
- Keep all code privacy-safe; use only synthetic/public data.
- Ensure explainability/traceability: every insight/risk should reference KPIs + underlying data slice.
- Prefer small, testable functions with type hints.
- Add/maintain automated tests when changing KPI or risk logic.
- Do not add enterprise integrations (Databricks, Jira, auth) beyond stubs unless explicitly requested.
